question: Why does biological aging occur? (unifying hypothesis)
winning_hypothesis: Aging is open-loop drift of the organism's homeostatic set-points (control error arising because selection maintains no reference for the post-reproductive body).

actions.detail: Pinned the seven-constraint set C1-C7 to primary literature via PubMed search_articles / get_article_metadata, with classic pre-DOI works resolved through OpenAlex openalex_get_work.
actions.evidence: 37 anchor papers with PMIDs/DOIs; see sources.md and sources.json

actions.detail: Froze an outcome-first intervention set from primary NIA ITP reports, defining membership by lifespan outcome (extends median: yes/no) before any mechanism was inspected.
actions.evidence: 17 interventions, 8 positive / 9 negative, each with its primary-report PMID; interventions_frozen.json

actions.detail: Assigned each compound an a-priori mechanism class from ChEMBL curated mechanism-of-action (compound_search, get_mechanism): A=attenuate anabolic/nutrient/inflammatory signaling, B=activate hormetic stress response, C=antioxidant/damage-buffer/dietary. NDGA's curated MoA (IGF1R/ERBB2) places it in the growth-signaling class A.
actions.evidence: MoA map for 10 druggable compounds; class assignments in interventions_frozen.json

actions.detail: Compared STRING networks of positive- vs negative-intervention protein targets (human, score>=400) to test whether the positives form a tighter network.
actions.evidence: positives 13 nodes/27 edges density 0.35 max-degree 8; negatives 4 nodes/4 edges density 0.67 — PPI topology does not separate winners from failures; string_compare.json

actions.detail: Tested whether a-priori mechanism direction predicts lifespan outcome (Fisher exact, label permutation, leave-one-out held-out accuracy).
actions.evidence: signaling/hormetic 8/9 vs antioxidant/dietary 0/8; Fisher p=3.7e-4; permutation p=4e-4; LOO held-out accuracy 94.1% vs 52.9% base-rate; convergence_result.json

actions.detail: Re-assigned the A/B/C mechanism labels with a separate classifier given only ChEMBL pharmacology and the outcome withheld, then re-ran the convergence on those labels, to check the labels are not outcome-driven.
actions.evidence: 16/17 concordance; on independent labels 8/10 vs 0/7, Fisher p=1.9e-3, held-out 88%; independent_recode.json, independent_convergence.json

actions.detail: Aspirin extends lifespan in the 2008 ITP cohort but shows no benefit in the 2019 cohort; tested whether the headline depends on its disputed status.
actions.evidence: drop-aspirin 7/8 vs 0/8 Fisher p=7e-4 held-out 94%; aspirin-as-negative 7/9 vs 0/8 Fisher p=1.9e-3 held-out 88% — all variants p<0.01; aspirin_sensitivity.json

actions.detail: Retained metformin-alone (a nutrient-sensing class-A drug that FAILED at 0.1%) as a scored miss in class A, and footnoted methylene blue's +6% female maximum-lifespan effect (median-lifespan null).
actions.evidence: metformin-alone PMID 27312235; methylene blue PMID 24245565 (P=0.004 female max)

actions.detail: Built an open-loop-drift simulation (per-individual multiplicative hazard, Gamma-distributed drift rate) to test whether the premise is sufficient for the observed mortality kinetics.
actions.evidence: individual MRDT 8.0 units; Gompertz acceleration + late-life plateau recovered; one drift parameter toggles Gompertzian vs flat hazard; sim_summary.json

actions.detail: Wrote the derivation as an explicit control model (state x, moving reference r, input u=K(r-x), damage D, hazard h), separating the one step evolutionary theory licenses from three added physiological posits P1-P3 (maintained reference; directional drift; damage downstream).

Scored six candidate currencies into a common causal template across C1-C7 (P=predicts +2, E=explains +1, C=compatible 0, X=contradicts -2, minus an added-assumption penalty) plus four hard-case kill-criteria. 'Predicts' reserved for assumption-independent predictions (C1 derivation, C5 held-out test); C2/C3 'explains' because the simulation assumes the hazard form; C4/C6/C7 'explains' (shared with rivals).
actions.evidence: open-loop drift fit 8 (P,E,E,E,P,E,E; 0 contradictions; 4/4 kill-criteria) vs best rival hyperfunction 4; candidate_scores.json

actions.detail: Steelmanned each rival's strongest reversibility prediction and identified the sharp discriminator. Information-loss (Lu 2020) predicts restoration via clock reset; hyperfunction shares input-lowering rescue (a sibling). The discriminating claim: rescue of function by restoring the regulatory input at a FIXED epigenetic clock and FIXED damage load.

Designed a necessity+rescue pilot in replicatively-aged human fibroblasts: reversible mTOR-lowering pulse with function measured at fixed damage load and fixed epigenetic-clock readout, to discriminate drift from both lesion and information-loss theories.
actions.evidence: result.md 'Falsifier and smallest pilot'; reasoning.md section 6

actions.detail: Positioned the hypothesis against the closest adjacent theories, verified in PubMed: mallostasis mean-reverting set-point model (PMID 38092834), Dilman neuroendocrine elevation model (PMID 381162), morphostatic-information loss (PMID 38636560); resilience/recovery-rate literature (Pyrkov 2021, Cohen 2018, Olde Rikkert 2016). 'Cybernetic theory of aging' has no clean primary PubMed anchor and is not cited.

Confirmed every cited PMID exists and matches its claim via PubMed get_article_metadata (titles for all; abstracts for scope-critical ITP, plateau, reprogramming, resilience claims); load-bearing DOIs via OpenAlex, including Yang 2024 typed as an erratum (original article PMID 36638792).

honest_limitations: Mortality and cross-species constraints are sufficiency demonstrations, not fits to primary life tables (SSA table not machine-accessible)
C4 hallmarks and C7 placement are catalogs/frameworks, not independent causal tests
The discriminating prediction is decisive against lesion and information-loss theories but not hyperfunction (a sibling), and has not been experimentally run
The edge over hyperfunction is unification and the evolutionary derivation, not a new molecule
network_access: www.ssa.gov requested and granted, but the server blocked the default client and a browser user-agent was not spoofed; the life-table Gompertz fit was therefore not machine-run
